title: Number Line Jump
description: A frog counting game where kids tap lily pads to make forward jumps and hop back from five.
learningGoals: Practice counting-on with one tap per jump
Notice how many remain after hopping back
interactionModel: tap-count collect and takeaway rounds using lily pad cards and a frog target
feedbackModel: Each tap speaks a count with pop and hop-like SFX; completed rounds use sparkle feedback and spoken totals or remainders.

modes.title: Hop Home
modes.skill: takeaway from five and counting remaining pads

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
